gates.name: synthetic-content-only
gates.reason: No production data, PHI, or implementation code is present.

gates.name: public-calculator-alignment
gates.reason: Typed models are aligned to the public calculator contract shape.

gates.name: fallback-coverage
gates.reason: Managed, CLI, and Arrow-file fallback paths are declared explicitly.

gates.name: provenance-completeness
gates.reason: The bundle carries source, checksum, and artifact-trace fields.

gates.name: nuget-readiness-gate
gates.reason: Packaging readiness is tracked separately from functional validation.
